full_text:
Empress Guo [Empress Mingyuan] 郭皇后[明元皇后]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Guo [Empress Mingyuan] (郭皇后[明元皇后])was born in Xiping. Wife of Cao Rui, was always consulted in government affairs by officers. Empress Guo [Empress Mingyuan] was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Empress Guo [Empress Mingyuan] lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
